description_long: This house features a single-story, open-plan layout with multiple rooms clearly delineated by interior walls and doorways. The structure is rectangular, with large windows distributed along the exterior walls, allowing for ample natural light. The roof is flat, giving the house a modern, minimalist appearance. The interior includes visible furnishings such as beds, sofas, and kitchen fixtures, suggesting a fully equipped residential space. The exterior is predominantly white with some light wood accents, contributing to a clean and contemporary aesthetic. The house sits on a flat, rectangular base, which could represent a plot or foundation slab.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a clean white exterior accented by light wood. The layout is open and well-lit, with visible interior furnishings.
description_view_0: This view shows the house from the long side, highlighting multiple large windows and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_1: This end view reveals the depth of the house, with visible room divisions and several windows on the shorter facade.
description_view_2: The opposite long side is visible here, again showing a series of windows and the full length of the house.
description_view_3: This end view displays the other short facade, with a clear view into several rooms and the arrangement of interior spaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with minimal overhang, flush with the facade, and no prominent porch or steps.
